content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree with NNN nodes (numbered 111 through NNN). For each valid iii, node iii has a value AiA_iAi‚Äč.

You should answer QQQ queries. In each query:


You are given two nodes aaa and bbb.
Let SSS denote the set of all nodes on the simple path between the nodes aaa and bbb (including these nodes).
Find the minimum value of ‚ą£Ax‚ąíAy‚ą£|A_x-A_y|‚ą£Ax‚Äč‚ąíAy‚Äč‚ą£ over all pairs x,y‚ąąSx, y \in Sx,y‚ąąS such that x‚Č†yx \neq yxÓÄ†=y.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
Each of the next N‚ąí1N-1N‚ąí1 lines contains two space-separated integers uuu and vvv denoting that nodes uuu and vvv are connected by an edge.
Each of the last QQQ lines contains two space-separated integers aaa and bbb describing a query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äē the answer to the query.
